title: sportsdataverse • Data and Tools for Sports Data Analytics
text: Install stable release CRAN: install development version GitHub : prebuilt SportsDataverse r-universe :
code: install.packages("sportsdataverse") if (!requireNamespace('pak', quietly = TRUE)){   install.packages('pak') } pak::pak("sportsdataverse/sportsdataverse-R") install.packages("sportsdataverse", repos = c("https://sportsdataverse.r-universe.dev", getOption("repos")))

title: sportsdataverse • Data and Tools for Sports Data Analytics
text: library(sportsdataverse) load following packages: baseballr, MLB college baseball data. cfbfastR, college football data. fastRhockey, NHL PWHL hockey data. hoopR, men’s college professional basketball data. oddsapiR, sportsbook odds Odds API. sportyR, drawing regulation playing surfaces. wehoop, women’s college professional basketball data. Additional ecosystem packages — cfbplotR, cfb4th, recruitR, softballR, mlbplotR — available SportsDataverse auto-loaded library(sportsdataverse).

title: sportsdataverse 0.3.0
text: Trimmed meta-package dependencies mirror nflverse model: package now imports cli, crayon, magrittr, rlang, rstudioapi alongside core SportsDataverse packages. sportsdataverse_deps() sportsdataverse_update() rewritten base R, dropping dplyr, purrr, tibble imports. sportsdataverse_update() gained devel argument points SportsDataverse r-universe (https://sportsdataverse.r-universe.dev) prebuilt development binaries, now reports via cli. Bumped minimum R version 4.1.0 added Config/testthat/edition: 3. Updated core package roster reflect current CRAN-published SportsDataverse R packages. Bumped minimum versions imported packages current CRAN releases: baseballr (>= 1.6.0), cfbfastR (>= 2.0.0), fastRhockey (>= 0.4.0), hoopR (>= 3.0.0), oddsapiR (>= 0.0.3), sportyR (>= 2.2.3), wehoop (>= 2.1.0). Removed worldfootballR SportsDataverse roster (upstream repository archived). Dropped already-commented archived packages (chessR, hockeyR, toRvik) README package roster. Switched README installation instructions pacman pak. Pointed URL/BugReports sportsdataverse GitHub organization added pkgdown site (https://r.sportsdataverse.org).

title: sportsdataverse 0.1.0
text: Added NEWS.md file track changes package.
